name: Bok — Complete Game (Rune-First Civilization)
description: Complete implementation of Bok from current 46-story state through shippable product. Covers rune circuit integration, custom engine (JP removal), Swedish audio soundscape (Tone.js), creature ecosystem, seasonal mechanics, Jätten boss, settlement archetypes, Tomte tutorial, diegetic UI polish, farming, equipment, Capacitor native build, and E2E testing. Optimized for ralph-tui parallel auto-detection via dependsOn fields.

userStories.title: Resource Pickup from Rune Circuits
userStories.description: As a player, I want to collect resources generated by rune circuits so that circuit-produced items enter my inventory.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for rune-resource-pickup.ts written FIRST
ECS system scans WorldState cells near player Position
Resources within pickup radius transfer to player Inventory
System runs after rune-world-tick in game loop
userStories.notes: Step 4 — bridges proven rune simulation into real inventory

userStories.title: Combat Runes — Thurisaz Damage + Algiz Shield + Tiwaz Boost
userStories.description: As a player, I want Thurisaz to damage creatures, Algiz to shield me, and Tiwaz to boost my damage when powered by rune circuits.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for rune-combat-effects.ts written FIRST
Thurisaz: powered + creature in range = damage proportional to signal
Algiz: powered = reduce incoming damage to player within radius
Tiwaz: powered = boost player damage output
userStories.notes: Step 5 — runes as 4X eXterminate pillar. Single file handles all three.

userStories.title: Ansuz Sensor Proximity Detection
userStories.description: As a player, I want Ansuz inscriptions to detect approaching creatures and emit signal for alarm circuits.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for rune-sensor.ts written FIRST
Ansuz detects creatures within detection radius
Emits signal when creature enters range, stops when leaves
userStories.notes: Step 5 — runes as eXplore sensor network

userStories.title: Custom rAF Game Loop
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a custom requestAnimationFrame loop replacing JP Runtime's update cycle.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for custom-loop.ts written FIRST
Start/stop, dt computation, pause/resume, dt clamping tested
~80 LOC standalone module, no Three.js dependency
userStories.notes: Step 6 — JP removal phase 1

userStories.title: Custom Scene Manager
userStories.description: As a developer, I want direct Three.js scene management replacing JP Runtime.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for scene-manager.ts written FIRST
WebGLRenderer creation, scene + camera setup, resize handling
Object add/remove by ID, cleanup on destroy
userStories.notes: Step 6 — JP removal phase 1

userStories.title: Custom Greedy Voxel Mesher
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a greedy mesher that produces merged quads for voxel chunks.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for greedy-mesher.ts written FIRST
Single block = 6 quads, same-type merge, different-type separate, air = no faces, internal culled
Output: vertex positions, normals, UVs, block types per quad
userStories.notes: Step 7 — custom voxel renderer

userStories.title: Settlement Archetype Detection
userStories.description: As a player, I want the game to recognize functional settlement patterns built from rune circuits.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for settlement-detector.ts written FIRST
Pattern matching on rune types + circuit connectivity + nearby blocks
userStories.notes: Step 9 — eXpand pillar

userStories.title: Tomte Tutorial AI State Machine
userStories.description: As a player, I want a Tomte companion that demonstrates rune circuit building through example.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for tomte-ai.ts written FIRST
States: IDLE → APPROACH → DEMONSTRATE → WAIT → CELEBRATE
Demonstration rune selected by player progress
userStories.notes: Step 10 — diegetic tutorial

userStories.title: Tone.js Swedish Audio Foundation
userStories.description: As a player, I want an immersive Swedish soundscape — wind through birch, water over stones, nyckelharpa phrases, kulning calls — not generic beeps.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for audio-manager.ts written FIRST
Ambient layers: wind (continuous), water (near shores), forest (bird calls)
Interaction sounds: mine hit, block place, chisel tap, rune inscription glow
Thematic sounds: nyckelharpa phrase on discovery, kulning call at dawn, birch bark crackle on Bok open
userStories.notes: Tone.js for synthesis, NOT sample files. Swedish folk instrument tones programmed.

userStories.title: Seasonal Cycle Mechanics
userStories.description: As a player, I want Vår/Sommar/Höst/Vinter seasons to affect gameplay — resource availability, creature behavior, night length, hunger drain.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for season-effects.ts written FIRST
SeasonState trait already exists — this system reads it and applies effects
Sommar: long days, abundant resources, fewer threats
Höst: golden light, mushrooms, Tranor migration, creature prep
Vinter: short days, snow cover, resource scarcity, constant threats, faster hunger
Vår: ice melt, new growth, returning creatures
userStories.notes: Visual seasons done (US-044), this adds mechanical effects

userStories.title: Farming and Crop System
userStories.description: As a player, I want to plant saplings and crops that grow over time, providing renewable food and resources.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for farming.ts written FIRST
Plant saplings: produce wood drops after N day cycles
Plant crops: wheat/berry/mushroom with growth stages (seed → sprout → mature → harvestable)
Growth rate affected by Berkanan rune proximity (rune-powered farming)
Harvest mechanic: tap mature crop to collect + reset to seed
userStories.notes: Ties runes to 4X eXploit pillar — Berkanan accelerates growth

userStories.title: Equipment and Armor System
userStories.description: As a player, I want to equip armor and accessories that modify my stats.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for equipment.ts written FIRST
Armor reduces incoming damage (flat reduction per piece)
Recipes: Näcken Shell Plate, Lindorm Scale Mail, Mörker Cloak, Runväktare Runeguard
~100 LOC ECS system + ~60 LOC recipe additions
userStories.notes: Creature drops → armor progression loop

userStories.title: Diegetic Vitals — Meta Screen Effects
userStories.description: As a player, I want health/hunger/stamina communicated through screen effects instead of just number bars.
acceptanceCriteria: CT test for MetaVitals.tsx written FIRST with screenshots
Health critical: edge desaturation, tunnel vision, screen cracks overlay
Hunger critical: world color desaturation, camera bob unsteadiness
Stamina critical: edge blur, forced walk animation feel
Recovery: color returns, deep breath audio cue (ties to RC-009)
userStories.notes: Replaces reliance on vitals bars — diegetic-ui.md spec

userStories.title: Mining Crack Overlay Renderer
userStories.description: As a player, I want the block I'm mining to visually crack as progress increases.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for mining-crack-renderer.ts written FIRST
4 crack stages mapped to mining progress [0-25%, 25-50%, 50-75%, 75-100%]
Crack texture overlay on targeted block face
Particle chips spawn at crack points
Block shatters on completion (existing particle system)
userStories.notes: diegetic-ui.md — spatial mining feedback replacing ring indicator

userStories.title: Creature Ecosystem Interactions
userStories.description: As a player, I want creatures to interact with each other — Mörker hunting Lyktgubbar, Tranor fleeing predators, Skogssniglar grazing.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for ecosystem.ts written FIRST
Mörker hunt Lyktgubbar (darkness extinguishes ambient light)
Skogssniglar graze on grass blocks → mycel transformation
Tranor flee Mörker (early warning system for player)
~120 LOC ECS system reading CreatureType + Position
userStories.notes: Brings Swedish ecosystem to life — creatures aren't independent

userStories.title: Rune Discovery Gating
userStories.description: As a player, I want runes discovered through world observation — watch sunrise for Sowilo, survive Mörker attack for Thurisaz — not given at start.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for rune-discovery-gates.ts written FIRST
Each rune has a discovery condition (observable game event)
Kenaz: first torch placed. Sowilo: watch sunrise. Isa: touch ice block.
Thurisaz: survive Mörker attack. Algiz: build first shelter.
Berkanan: plant first sapling. Fehu: collect first resource.
Discovery triggers Kunskapen entry + Sagan milestone
~100 LOC ECS system extending existing RuneDiscovery trait
userStories.notes: Rune discovery is narrative, not tutorial — the world teaches

userStories.title: Jätten Boss Encounter System
userStories.description: As a player, I want Jätten to appear at inscription level 1000+ as the culminating world boss.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for jatten-boss.ts written FIRST
Jätten spawns near player's largest structure at inscription level 1000+
Boss behavior: inspects structures, tests defenses, regenerates from terrain blocks
Defeat drops Runsten Seal (prevents decay in territory)
Post-defeat: biome transformation begins around boss site
~150 LOC state machine + ~50 LOC spawn conditions
userStories.notes: Endgame content — creatures.md + progression.md Act V

userStories.title: Session Pause/Resume Polish
userStories.description: As a player, I want pause/resume and auto-save to work seamlessly for mobile 5-minute sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for edge cases written FIRST
No save during active combat (delay until safe)
Resume banner shows meaningful context from saga log
Micro-goal system suggests next discoverable thing within 1-2 minutes
userStories.notes: US-047 completion — mobile session design

userStories.title: Wire Combat + Sensor Rune Systems into Game Loop
userStories.description: As a developer, I want combat and sensor rune systems running each frame in the game engine.
acceptanceCriteria: rune-combat-effects added after rune-world-tick in system order

userStories.title: Rewrite game.ts to Custom Engine
userStories.description: As a developer, I want GameBridge using custom-loop + scene-manager instead of JP Runtime.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace JP Runtime.loadRuntime() with custom-loop + scene-manager
userStories.notes: Step 6 — biggest risk task

userStories.title: Rune-Aware Face Splitting in Mesher
userStories.description: As a developer, I want faces with rune inscriptions kept as individual quads for decal rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: Rune-inscribed faces NOT merged with adjacent faces

userStories.title: Settlement Bonus Effects
userStories.description: As a player, I want detected settlements to provide gameplay bonuses.
acceptanceCriteria: Smedja = combat bonus, Kvarn = food bonus, Vakttorn = detection radius, Försvarsverk = defense

userStories.title: Settlement Indicator HUD
userStories.description: As a player, I want a HUD indicator showing settlement type and active bonuses.
acceptanceCriteria: CT test written FIRST with screenshots per RuneSimulator gold standard
Shows Swedish settlement name + active bonuses
Appears when player within detected settlement

userStories.title: Tomte Spawn Conditions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Tomte to appear after the player builds their first structure and leave after 3 successful inscriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Spawns after player builds first 3-block structure

userStories.title: Tomte Creature Parts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Tomte rendered as a building-block creature — stocky body, pointed hat, bushy beard.

userStories.title: TomteHint HUD Tooltip
userStories.description: As a player, I want a diegetic speech-bubble near the Tomte with tutorial hints.
acceptanceCriteria: CT test written FIRST with screenshots
Diegetic carved-wood speech bubble, not UI popup
Shows tutorial text from Tomte AI state

userStories.title: Emergent Machine Discovery
userStories.description: As a player, I want the game to recognize when I build known circuit patterns and reward me with codex entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for circuit-recognizer.ts written FIRST
Scan circuit topology against templates: clock, NOT gate, AND gate, production chain
Discovery triggers codex entry + saga milestone

userStories.title: Biome Ambient Audio Layers
userStories.description: As a player, I want the ambient soundscape to change with my biome — birch forest birds vs mountain wind vs coastal waves.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for biome-audio.ts written FIRST
Bokskogen: deeper forest sounds, distant kulning
~100 LOC, depends on audio-manager from RC-009
userStories.notes: All synthesized via Tone.js, no sample files

userStories.title: Creature Audio Integration
userStories.description: As a player, I want creatures to have procedural audio — Mörker ambient dimming, Lindorm ground rumble, Tranor distant calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for creature-audio.ts written FIRST
Mörker: ambient audio dims on proximity
Lindormar: ground tremor rumble (low bass oscillator)
~80 LOC, depends on audio-manager from RC-009
userStories.notes: Procedural via Tone.js — pitch-shifted sine/noise bursts

userStories.title: Seasonal Visual Effects
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see snow falling in vinter, leaves falling in höst, and blossoms in vår.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for season-particles.ts written FIRST
Vinter: falling snow particles (white, slow drift)
userStories.notes: Visual only — mechanical effects are in RC-010

userStories.title: Jätten Encounter Triggers and Warning System
userStories.description: As a player, I want warnings before Jätten arrives — ground tremors, fleeing creatures, distant footsteps.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for jatten-triggers.ts written FIRST
Warning phase at inscription level 800+: ground tremor camera shakes
Warning phase at 900+: creatures flee away from largest structure
Trigger at 1000+: Jätten spawns from RC-017
Audio: deep rhythmic bass (depends on RC-009)
userStories.notes: Creates dread before the boss shows up

userStories.title: X-Ray Chisel View
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see rune inscriptions on hidden block faces by long-pressing the chisel.
acceptanceCriteria: Long-press with chisel active → X-ray mode
Touching block faces rendered as translucent, revealing internal rune inscriptions
~60 LOC addition to block highlight renderer
userStories.notes: structures.md spec — needed for debugging complex circuits

userStories.title: Advanced Crafting Tiers — Forge and Scriptorium Recipes
userStories.description: As a player, I want Forge (tier 2) and Scriptorium (tier 3) recipes for metal tools, lanterns, and enchanted items.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for new recipes written FIRST
Forge recipes: Iron Pickaxe, Iron Sword, Lantern, Ember Lantern, armor pieces
Scriptorium recipes: Crystal Lens, Glyph Lamp, Bok upgrades, Chisel enchantment
Treated Planks, Reinforced Bricks, composite blocks
All recipes added to RECIPES in blocks.ts
userStories.notes: crafting.md planned recipes — completes crafting progression

userStories.title: Migrate BlockHighlightBehavior
userStories.description: Convert from JP Behavior to plain TS class with update(dt, scene).
acceptanceCriteria: Same wireframe logic, no Actor dependency
userStories.notes: Step 8 — behavior migration

userStories.title: Migrate CelestialBehavior
userStories.description: Convert sun/moon/stars from JP Behavior to plain class.

userStories.title: Migrate ViewModelBehavior
userStories.description: Convert first-person held item from JP Behavior.

userStories.title: Migrate ParticlesBehavior
userStories.description: Convert instanced mesh particles from JP Behavior.

userStories.title: Migrate AmbientParticlesBehavior
userStories.description: Convert floating atmospheric particles from JP Behavior.

userStories.title: Migrate CreatureRendererBehavior
userStories.description: Convert creature mesh assembly + procedural animation from JP Behavior. Split into creature-renderer.ts + creature-anim.ts if over 200 LOC.
acceptanceCriteria: creature-renderer.ts + creature-anim.ts if needed, each under 200 LOC
userStories.notes: Largest behavior (254 LOC) — likely needs decomposition

userStories.title: Migrate EnemyRendererBehavior
userStories.description: Merge into creature-renderer or keep as hostile variant.

userStories.title: Migrate InputBehavior
userStories.description: Convert keyboard/mouse/touch from JP Behavior to plain module.
acceptanceCriteria: Joystick state + input helpers already extracted

userStories.title: Wire Settlement Systems
userStories.description: Add settlement detector + bonus to game loop, indicator to App.tsx.

userStories.title: Wire Tomte Systems
userStories.description: Add tomte-ai + spawner to game loop, hint to App.tsx, Tomte to creature renderer.

userStories.title: Wire Custom Mesher into Chunk Rendering
userStories.description: Replace JP VoxelRenderer mesh generation with custom greedy mesher.

userStories.title: Norrsken Aurora Event System
userStories.description: As a player, I want periodic aurora borealis events that pacify creatures and reveal hidden resources.
acceptanceCriteria: All creatures become passive during event
Bok Kartan reveals nearby unexplored landmarks
Aurora ribbon animation (green/purple/blue cycling via RC-009 audio cue)
userStories.notes: NorrskenEvent trait already exists — this adds the full event logic

userStories.title: Draugar Observation Behavior
userStories.description: As a player, I want Draugar that only advance when I'm not looking — freeze when observed.
acceptanceCriteria: Dot-product player look-direction check: freeze when watched
Spawn at burial mounds, teleport back at dawn
Screen effects on proximity: chromatic aberration + frost particles
Audio: ambient dims to silence (RC-029 integration)
userStories.notes: creatures.md — Draugar are the creepiest creature in the game

userStories.title: Lindormar Tunneling Behavior
userStories.description: As a player, I want Lindormar (wyrms) to tunnel through soft blocks, leaving permanent tunnels.
acceptanceCriteria: Tunnels through dirt, sand, grass blocks (removes them)
Vibration attraction: mining activity triggers Lindorm approach
userStories.notes: creatures.md — Lindormar reshape the landscape

userStories.title: Blothögen Corrupted Biome Content
userStories.description: As a player, I want Blothögen to be a fully realized corrupted zone with dead trees, soot, fog, and permanent Mörker.
acceptanceCriteria: Dead birch trees (white bark, no leaves) in terrain generator
Soot blocks + corrupted stone in block definitions
Permanent fog overlay when in Blothögen
Mörker always active in Blothögen (larger variants)
userStories.notes: biomes.md — the endgame danger zone

userStories.title: Progression Arc — Discovery Quest System
userStories.description: As a player, I want a discovery-driven multi-act progression that guides me from awakening through Jätten confrontation.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test for progression-arc.ts written FIRST
Act I (Day 1): survive first night milestone
Act II (Days 2-4): establish base, explore biome, craft workstation
Act III (Days 5-15): explore second biome, find Fornlämning, defeat Runväktare
Act IV (Days 15-30): settlement hamlet size, Jätten warning
Act V (Days 30+): Jätten confrontation, Runsten Seal
Inscription level thresholds drive act transitions
userStories.notes: progression.md — replaces tutorial quest scaffold

userStories.title: Remove All JP Dependencies
userStories.description: Update game.ts to use renderer instances directly. Remove @jolly-pixel/engine and @jolly-pixel/voxel.renderer.
acceptanceCriteria: No JP imports remain in codebase (grep verified)
userStories.notes: Final JP removal — all behaviors migrated

userStories.title: Save Slot Management UI
userStories.description: As a player, I want to manage multiple save slots — name, delete, preview.
acceptanceCriteria: CT test written FIRST with screenshots
World preview (day count, biome, inscription level) on slot

userStories.title: Settings Screen — Audio, Graphics, Controls
userStories.description: As a player, I want a settings screen to control audio volume, graphics quality, and input sensitivity.
acceptanceCriteria: CT test written FIRST with screenshots
Audio: master volume, ambient volume, interaction volume, mute toggle
Graphics: render distance, particle density, shadow quality
Controls: sensitivity sliders (mouse, touch), invert Y

userStories.title: PWA Service Worker
userStories.description: As a player, I want the game to work offline after first load.
acceptanceCriteria: Service worker caches all static assets
Offline play works after initial load
Add to Home Screen prompt on mobile browsers
userStories.notes: mobile-first.md — PWA before native

userStories.title: Depth 0 Verification Gate
userStories.description: Full test suite after all depth-0 tasks merge.

userStories.title: Depth 1 Verification Gate
userStories.description: Full test suite after all depth-1 tasks merge.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm biome check --write . && pnpm tsc -b && pnpm test passes

userStories.title: Depth 2 Verification Gate
userStories.description: Full test suite after behavior migrations + wiring.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm biome check --write . && pnpm tsc -b && pnpm test passes

userStories.title: Playwright E2E Smoke Test Suite
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the critical gameplay path.
acceptanceCriteria: Smoke: title screen renders, new game starts, canvas appears

userStories.title: Capacitor Native Build
userStories.description: As a developer, I want iOS and Android builds via Capacitor.
acceptanceCriteria: Android build generates .apk via Android Studio
App icons (1024x1024 source) + splash screens generated
Native haptics wired via Capacitor Haptics plugin
Native SQLite via Capacitor Community SQLite
pnpm build && npx cap sync passes
userStories.notes: Capacitor 8 already configured

userStories.title: Accessibility Audit
userStories.description: As a developer, I want WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for all UI text, color contrast, and interaction targets.
acceptanceCriteria: Screen reader announces game state changes

userStories.title: Performance Profiling Pass
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to verify all performance budgets are met on target devices.
acceptanceCriteria: FPS >= 55 on mobile (iPhone SE, Samsung A51 simulated)
Profile with Chrome DevTools Performance tab

userStories.title: Final Integration Verification
userStories.description: Full quality gate: lint, typecheck, all tests, build, bundle size, play-test.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm vitest run --project browser passes (all CT tests)
AGENTS.md updated with new file inventory
Play-test: title → new game → survive night → craft → inscribe rune → build circuit → settlement detected
userStories.notes: Ship gate — game is complete after this passes
